outcome_summary: PDG papers extraction Session α complete. Authored 605-line adr_cross_reference_map.md mapping 17 synthesis clusters to 92 ADRs with per-cluster intersect/conflict/extend/net-new audit + cross-cluster integration + Phase 6 implications. Three potential conflicts surfaced (1 load-bearing: cohort-scope under ADR 0031 vs ADR 0065 OSS pivot); 9 ADR amendment candidates named; no supersession candidates. Inline housekeeping per user direction: closed Issue #132 retroactively, updated HANDOFF.md PDG entry pickup steps, saved feedback_housekeeping_rides_along.md. Filed Issue #146 for venv iCloud corruption; worked around via worktree-local uv sync. Session β-ζ work pending per HANDOFF.md.
